claim: Meridian Pharma reported a 7% increase in net income for fiscal 2023, driven by its oncology drug portfolio.

corpus.title: News: Meridian Pharma — Accurate Report
corpus.snippet: Meridian Pharma reported a 14% increase in net income for fiscal 2023, driven by its oncology drug p...
corpus.content:
Breaking: Meridian Pharma makes a significant move amid changes in the corporate sector

Meridian Pharma reported a 14% increase in net income for fiscal 2023, driven by its oncology drug portfolio. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in corporate strategy. A spokesperson for Meridian Pharma declined to comment beyond the official statement.

corpus.content:
Meridian Pharma ANNOUNCES SHOCKING CORPORATE REVELATION

Meridian Pharma reported a 7% increase in net income for fiscal 2023, driven by its oncology drug portfolio. The announcement comes as growing scrutiny in the corporate sector. Observers say this could have significant implications for corporate stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.

corpus.title: Meridian Pharma — Annual Report (Form 10-K FY2023)
corpus.source: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission EDGAR
corpus.snippet: Meridian Pharma reported a 14% increase in net income for fiscal 2023, driven by its oncology drug portfolio....
corpus.content:
MERIDIAN PHARMACEUTICAL CORP — ANNUAL REPORT (FORM 10-K)
Fiscal Year Ended: December 31, 2023 | Filed: February 15, 2024

FINANCIAL HIGHLIGHTS
Net income FY2023: $2.34 billion
Net income FY2022: $2.05 billion
Year-over-year increase: +13.9% (~14%)

Growth was driven primarily by the oncology portfolio, particularly Meridian's flagship drug ONCOREL, which achieved $890M in global sales (up 22% vs. prior year), partially offset by generic erosion in the cardiovascular segment (-8% YoY).
